summary: Plugin detection: git rev-parse --show-toplevel errors → not a plugin; success but no .claude/plugin.json → not a plugin; json present → plugin.
context: Added File Reference Conventions as Bug lens #5 in skill-review: CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR for intra-skill, CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT for inter-skill (with plugin detection). Added Step 2 reminder.
rationale: Plugin detection: git rev-parse --show-toplevel errors → not a plugin; success but no .claude/plugin.json → not a plugin; json present → plugin.

alternatives.option: a plugin; success but no .claude/plugin.json → not a plugin; json present → plugin
